title: Wicket and the Dandelion Warriors: An Ewok Adventure
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:WicketDandelion.jpg]] |title=''Wicket and the Dandelion Warriors:
An Ewok Adventure'' |author=[[Larry Weinberg]] [[Bob Carrau]] (story) |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Deborah Colvin Borgo]] |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]] |early release= |release date=[[November]] [[1985]]{{BanthaCite|31|Ewoks & Droids: Read All About 'Em}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type= |pages= |isbn=0-394-87734-9 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Wicket and the Dandelion Warriors: An Ewok Adventure''''' is a [[1985]] children's book adaptation of the fourth episode of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] TV series, entitled "[[To Save Deej]]." {{Book-stub}} ==Plot summary== {{Plot-link|Ewoks (television series)}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Wicket and the Dandelion Warriors: An Ewok Adventure}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |organisms= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Sources== *{{BanthaCite|31|Ewoks & Droids: Read All About 'Em}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{EwoksEpisodes}} {{Interlang |ka=უიკეტი და მეომარი ბაბუაწვერები: ევოკების თავგადასავალი }} [[Category:Ewok Adventure books]]
